name: com.loopxxi/loop-mcp
description: L402-native MCP server for autonomous AI agents. All tools are gated by per-call Lightning micropayments (10-25 sats). Provides composited Bitcoin fee intelligence, send-or-wait decisions, Lightning Address resolution, and Bitcoin transaction analysis — the data primitives agents need to operate in the Bitcoin economy.

payment.pricing_note: Per-tool pricing from 10 to 25 sats per call. Invoice issued on first request; retry with preimage to access result.

tools.name: btc_price
tools.description: Current Bitcoin price in USD and major fiat currencies. Source: mempool.space.

tools.name: btc_send_decision
tools.description: Composited send-or-wait decision for Bitcoin transactions. Returns SEND_NOW, WAIT, or URGENT_ONLY verdict with fee rates in sat/vB, mempool pressure, and estimated savings. Single decision call replaces parsing multiple raw mempool endpoints.

tools.name: lightning_address_resolve
tools.description: Resolve a Lightning Address (user@domain.com) to a payable BOLT11 invoice for a given amount. Handles the full LNURL-pay protocol — three HTTP calls reduced to one MCP tool call.

tools.name: tx_decode_explain
tools.description: Fetch a Bitcoin transaction by txid and return a structured agent summary: transaction type, fee, fee rate in sat/vB, confirmation status, RBF/SegWit/Taproot flags, and a one-line agent_summary string ready for LLM context injection. Saves 500-2000 tokens vs parsing raw JSON.

auth.description: No API key required. On first tools/call request, the server responds HTTP 402 with a Lightning invoice in the WWW-Authenticate: L402 header. Pay the invoice, then retry with Authorization: L402 <token>:<preimage>.
